problem_statement: Analyze video content at scale using AI — extract transcripts, scene descriptions, and keyframes for RAG ingestion or media asset management.
hypothesis: Azure AI Content Understanding can efficiently process video files with GPT-4.1 backing, providing structured output (transcriptions, keyframes, scene descriptions) useful for content search and retrieval.
customer_scenario: Media companies, educators, and enterprises need to index and search large video libraries. Content Understanding automates video analysis to produce searchable metadata and segment descriptions.
data_requirements: User provides local video clip (<1 min, <200 MB). No production data required.
security_notes: Uses managed identity only (disableLocalAuth: true). No keys stored in env files. RBAC for deployer principal set at deployment time.
